name: ASEffect
brief_description: Resource defining modifications to attributes and tags.
description: [ASEffect] defines a package of attribute modifiers and tags. Can be instant, have a duration, or be infinite.

properties.name: activation_blocked_all_tags
properties.description: Effect cannot be applied if the target has [b]all[/b] of these tags simultaneously (AND logic).

properties.name: activation_blocked_any_tags
properties.description: Effect cannot be applied if the target has [b]any[/b] of these tags (OR logic).

properties.name: activation_required_all_tags
properties.description: Effect requires the target to have [b]all[/b] of these tags to be applied (AND logic).

properties.name: activation_required_any_tags
properties.description: Effect requires the target to have [b]at least one[/b] of these tags to be applied (OR logic).

properties.name: blocked_tags
properties.description: Tags that dictate whether this effect is blocked from applying.

properties.name: cues
properties.description: Visual and Audio Cues emitted by this effect.

properties.name: duration_magnitude
properties.description: Base duration value.

properties.name: duration_policy
properties.description: INSTANT (0), DURATION (1), INFINITE (2).

properties.name: effect_name
properties.description: Unique name for the effect.

properties.name: effect_tag
properties.description: Tag identifying this effect.

properties.name: events_on_apply
properties.description: Events dispatched when this effect is successfully applied to a target.

properties.name: events_on_remove
properties.description: Events dispatched when this effect is removed from a target.

properties.name: execute_periodic_tick_on_application
properties.description: If true, the periodic effect triggers immediately upon application instead of waiting for the first period to elapse.

properties.name: granted_tags
properties.description: Tags granted while effect is active.

properties.name: modifiers
properties.description: The number of attribute modifiers in this effect package.

properties.name: period
properties.description: The time in seconds between periodic applications. Only used if duration_policy is DURATION or INFINITE.

properties.name: removed_tags
properties.description: Tags corresponding to effects that should be removed when this effect applies.

properties.name: requirements
properties.description: The number of attribute requirements needed to apply this effect.

properties.name: stacking_policy
properties.description: Policy determining how new applications stack with existing instances of the same effect tag.

properties.name: target_type
properties.description: Defines whether the effect applies to the owner (Self) or should be passed to other targets (Others).

properties.name: use_custom_duration
properties.description: If true, duration is calculated via ASC callback (index -1).

methods.name: get_modifier_attribute
methods.description: Returns the name of the attribute targeted by a modifier at a given index.

methods.name: get_modifier_count
methods.description: Returns the number of modifiers defined in this effect.

methods.name: get_modifier_magnitude
methods.description: Returns the base magnitude of a specific modifier by its index.

methods.name: get_modifier_operation
methods.description: Returns the mathematical operation of a specific modifier.

methods.name: get_requirement_amount
methods.description: Returns the amount for the specified requirement.

methods.name: get_requirement_attribute
methods.description: Returns the attribute for the specified requirement.

methods.name: is_modifier_custom
methods.description: Returns true if the specified modifier uses custom calculation logic.

constants.name: POLICY_INSTANT
constants.description: Effect is applied once and removed immediately.

constants.name: POLICY_DURATION
constants.description: Effect lasts for a specified duration.

constants.name: STACK_OVERRIDE
constants.description: New application replaces the old (resets timer).

constants.name: TARGET_SELF
constants.description: Effect is applied to the component that originated it.

constants.name: TARGET_OTHERS
constants.description: Effect is intended to be applied to other components (e.g., via projectiles or area attacks).

constants.name: OP_ADD
constants.description: Adds the magnitude to the attribute.

constants.name: OP_MULTIPLY
constants.description: Multiplies the attribute by the magnitude.

constants.name: OP_DIVIDE
constants.description: Divides the attribute by the magnitude.

constants.name: OP_OVERRIDE
constants.description: Overrides the attribute with the magnitude.
